product_overview: MedVita is a browser-based Healthcare Management System for small-to-medium clinics that centralizes patient registration, appointment scheduling, live queue management, prescriptions, and analytics into a single role-adaptive dashboard.
core_goals: Provide role-adaptive workflows for doctors, patients, and receptionists to manage clinical visits end-to-end
Enable realtime walk-in queue synchronization between receptionists and doctors using Supabase Realtime
Simplify appointment booking and prescription generation with printable/downloadable outputs
Protect clinic data via Supabase Auth + RLS while offering a responsive, accessible UI

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate users via email and password with explicit role selection; successful login redirects users to the dashboard appropriate for their role.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Select role using toggle -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Login button to submit -> See loading spinner while session resolves -> Redirect to /dashboard on success -> See dashboard

Navigate to /login -> Select role using toggle -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field with incorrect credentials -> Click Login button to submit -> See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: Patient Signup
features.description: Self-service patient registration creating a profile and signing the user in to their patient dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /signup -> Fill full name field -> Fill email input field -> Fill phone field -> Fill date of birth field -> Fill password field -> Fill confirm password field -> Click Sign Up button -> See validation success -> Redirect to /dashboard on success -> See patient dashboard

Navigate to /signup -> Fill full name field -> Fill email input field -> Fill password field -> Fill confirm password field with non-matching value -> Click Sign Up button -> See validation errors on mismatch

features.name: Receptionist Signup
features.description: Reception staff register using a staff/clinic code which links them to a doctor's clinic (employer_id).
user_flows: Navigate to /staff-signup -> Fill name field -> Fill email input field -> Fill staff code field -> Fill password field -> Click Submit registration form -> See staff code verification -> Redirect to /dashboard/reception on success -> See Reception Dashboard

Navigate to /staff-signup -> Fill name field -> Fill email input field -> Fill staff code field with invalid code -> Fill password field -> Click Submit registration form -> See error on invalid staff code

features.name: Dashboard Home
features.description: Role-adaptive dashboard presenting stats, upcoming appointments, engagement charts and a realtime Live Queue panel for doctors.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> See statistics cards for patients appointments and prescriptions -> See upcoming appointments list -> If role is doctor then see engagement charts and Live Queue panel
Navigate to /dashboard -> Session fails to load or user is unauthorized -> See loading spinner then see protected route error or redirect to /login

features.name: Appointment Management
features.description: Browse calendar views (month/week/list), book new appointments, and update appointment status (patients and doctors).
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/appointments -> Select Week View -> Click a time slot -> See Booking Modal open -> Select doctor (patient flow) or select patient (doctor flow) -> Pick date -> Pick time slot -> Click Confirm -> See appointment inserted -> See appointment listed in calendar
Navigate to /dashboard/appointments -> Click a time slot -> Select date and time that is already taken -> Click Confirm -> See error indicating slot unavailable or conflicting appointment

features.name: Patient Management
features.description: Doctor-only patient list, search, add/edit patient records, view full medical history and quick-create prescriptions.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/patients -> Use search to find patient by name -> Click patient row -> See Patient Details Drawer open -> Click Create Prescription -> See PrescriptionCreator modal pre-filled
Navigate to /dashboard/patients -> Click Add Patient -> Fill required personal info -> Leave required Age field empty -> Click Save -> See validation error for missing Age

features.name: Doctor Availability Management
features.description: Doctors configure weekly availability (toggle days, set start/end times) which is used for booking slot generation.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/availability -> Toggle availability for Monday -> Set start time -> Set end time -> Click Save availability schedule -> See upsert success confirmation
Navigate to /dashboard/availability -> Toggle availability for a day -> Set end time earlier than start time -> Click Save availability schedule -> See validation error about invalid time range

features.name: Prescriptions
features.description: Doctors create structured prescription entries; patients view and download their prescriptions as PDF.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/prescriptions -> Click New Prescription (or open from patient row) -> Add medicine rows with name dosage frequency and duration -> Add instructions -> Click Save -> See prescription listed in grid -> Click Download -> Receive PDF
Navigate to /dashboard/prescriptions -> Click New Prescription -> Add medicine row with missing medicine name -> Click Save -> See validation error for required medication name

features.name: Reception Dashboard (Walk-In Queue)
features.description: Receptionists add walk-in patients to today's queue; the queue publishes realtime updates to the doctor's Live Queue panel.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/reception -> Fill Patient Name field -> Fill optional vitals fields -> Click Submit -> See toast "✓ [Name] added to the queue!" -> See new patient appear at top of Waitlist Today via realtime update

Navigate to /dashboard/reception -> Attempt to submit new patient when profile.employer_id is null -> Click Submit -> See error screen explaining invalid clinic linking and instructions to obtain valid clinic code

features.name: AI Medical Chatbot
features.description: Conversational assistant that answers medical and app-related questions using Gemini Pro API or canned fallbacks.
user_flows: Navigate to /chatbot -> Type a medical question into input -> Click Submit -> See typing indicator -> Receive AI response displayed in conversation history -> See auto-scroll to latest message
Navigate to /chatbot -> Type a question -> Click Submit -> API call to /api/chat fails -> See fallback canned response or navigation shortcut message

features.name: Settings
features.description: User profile and application settings: update profile, change password, toggle dark/light theme, and doctor-specific clinic/prescription customization.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Click Settings icon in header -> See Settings modal open -> Update profile name and phone -> Click Save -> See success confirmation and updated profile displayed
Navigate to /dashboard -> Click Settings icon in header -> Change password and click Save -> Network request fails -> See error message that changes could not be saved

features.name: Authentication - Logout
features.description: Terminate user session and redirect to the login page.
user_flows: While on any /dashboard route -> Click logout button in header -> See session cleared -> Redirect to /login -> See login form
While on any /dashboard route -> Click logout button in header -> SignOut network call fails -> See error notification and remain on current page

routes.description: Public landing page showcasing MedVita features and CTA buttons
User login page with email/password and role selection
Receptionist/staff registration page with staff code verification
Main dashboard home, adapts content by role (doctor/patient)
Appointment management for patients and doctors
Patient management and records for doctors only
Prescription viewing for patients; creation for doctors
Receptionist dashboard for managing check-ins and appointments

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with email and password, role selection (patient/doctor)
user_interactions: Select role (patient or doctor) using toggle
See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: Patient Signup
features.description: New patient self-registration with profile creation
user_interactions: Fill full name, email, phone, date of birth
See validation errors on mismatch or missing fields

features.name: Receptionist Signup
features.description: Staff/receptionist registration requiring a staff access code
user_interactions: Fill name, email, staff code, password fields
See error on invalid staff code

features.name: Dashboard Home
features.description: Role-adaptive home screen showing stats, upcoming appointments, charts

features.name: Appointment Management
features.description: Book, view, cancel, and manage appointments for patients and doctors
user_interactions: Patient can book new appointment by selecting doctor, date, time
Doctor can approve or cancel pending appointments

features.name: Patient Management
features.description: Doctor-only feature to view and manage patient records
user_interactions: Click patient to view full profile and medical history

features.name: Doctor Availability Management
features.description: Doctors set their weekly availability schedule
user_interactions: Toggle availability for each day of the week
Set start and end times for available days

features.name: Prescriptions
features.description: Doctors create prescriptions; patients view their own

user_interactions.Doctor: Select patient, add medications, dosage, instructions, click Save

features.name: Reception Dashboard
features.description: Receptionist manages patient check-ins and appointment views

api_calls.endpoint: Supabase DB update appointments check-in status

features.name: AI Medical Chatbot
features.description: An AI assistant that answers medical questions
user_interactions: Type a medical question or symptom
Submit and wait for AI response

features.name: Settings
features.description: User profile and application settings management

features.name: Authentication - Logout
features.description: User session termination

known_limitations.issue: Chatbot relies on a serverless /api/chat endpoint that may not be available in local dev without Vercel CLI
known_limitations.impact: Chatbot messages will fail with network errors without the API route running

known_limitations.issue: Staff signup uses a hardcoded staff access code for validation
known_limitations.impact: Any user with the code can register as receptionist; no server-side validation
Direct URL access may expose UI but Supabase RLS policies protect actual data
